### `r ad$label`

```{r}
#| eval: !expr identical(section, "scores")
if (is_html) {
  msens::plot_flower(
    ad$scores,
    fld_category = component,
    fld_height   = score,
    fld_width    = even,
    interactive  = TRUE,
    title        = ad$label)
} else {
  msens::ggplot_flower(
    ad$scores,
    fld_category = component,
    fld_height   = score,
    fld_width    = even,
    title        = ad$label)
}
```

```{r}
#| eval: !expr identical(section, "species")
#| results: asis

# helper: wrap a kable in an overflow-x div for HTML, emit as-is for
# pdf/docx so the native format renders normally.
emit_table <- function(df, caption, align = NULL) {
  if (is_html) {
    tbl <- knitr::kable(
      df,
      format     = "html",
      escape     = FALSE,
      caption    = caption,
      align      = align,
      table.attr = 'class="table table-sm"')
    cat('<div style="overflow-x: auto; margin-bottom: 1em;">\n\n')
    cat(as.character(tbl), sep = "\n")
    cat("\n\n</div>\n\n")
  } else {
    cat(knitr::kable(
      df,
      caption  = caption,
      align    = align,
      booktabs = TRUE,
      longtable = TRUE), sep = "\n")
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}

d <- ad$spp
if (nrow(d) == 0) {
  cat("_No species found for this area._\n\n")
} else {
  # normalize NA er_code so pivot_wider and compute_er_score behave
  d <- d |> dplyr::mutate(
    er_code = ifelse(is.na(er_code), "NA", er_code))
  n_spp <- dplyr::n_distinct(d$mdl_seq)

  # * species count by category x extinction-risk code ----
  # column order: compute_er_score() descending, then er_code ascending
  er_codes_seen   <- sort(unique(d$er_code))
  er_scores_seen  <- msens::compute_er_score(er_codes_seen)
  er_codes_sorted <- er_codes_seen[order(-er_scores_seen, er_codes_seen)]

  summary_df <- d |>
    dplyr::distinct(mdl_seq, sp_cat, er_code) |>
    dplyr::count(sp_cat, er_code) |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(
      names_from  = er_code,
      values_from = n,
      values_fill = 0L) |>
    dplyr::rename(Category = sp_cat) |>
    dplyr::arrange(Category) |>
    dplyr::relocate(Category, dplyr::all_of(er_codes_sorted))
  # add Total column + Total row
  summary_df$Total <- rowSums(summary_df[, er_codes_sorted, drop = FALSE])
  tot_row <- c(
    list(Category = "Total"),
    lapply(summary_df[, c(er_codes_sorted, "Total"), drop = FALSE], sum))
  summary_df <- dplyr::bind_rows(summary_df, tibble::as_tibble(tot_row))

  emit_table(
    summary_df,
    caption = sprintf(
      "Species counts by category and extinction-risk code (%d species).",
      n_spp),
    align = c("l", rep("r", ncol(summary_df) - 1)))

  # * top-20 highest-scoring species ----
  top20 <- d |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      mdl_seq, sp_cat, sp_common, sp_scientific,
      er_code, er_score, suit_er_area) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(suit_er_area)) |>
    utils::head(20)

  top20_display <- top20 |>
    dplyr::transmute(
      Category   = sp_cat,
      Common     = if (is_html) sprintf(
        '<a href="%s/?mdl_seq=%d" target="_blank">%s</a>',
        mapsp_base, mdl_seq, sp_common) else sp_common,
      Scientific = sp_scientific,
      `ER code`  = er_code,
      `ER score` = scales::percent(er_score, accuracy = 1),
      Score      = signif(suit_er_area, 3))

  emit_table(
    top20_display,
    caption = "Top 20 highest-scoring species (by habitat-weighted extinction risk).",
    align   = c("l", "l", "l", "l", "r", "r"))

  # * download full species list (CSV) ----
  url <- paste0(
    api_base, "/species.csv",
    "?ver=",   utils::URLencode(ver,      reserved = TRUE),
    "&kind=",  utils::URLencode(ad$kind,  reserved = TRUE),
    "&value=", utils::URLencode(ad$value, reserved = TRUE),
    "&label=", utils::URLencode(ad$label, reserved = TRUE))
  cat(sprintf(
    "[Download full species list (CSV — %d species)](%s)\n\n",
    n_spp, url))
}
```
